title: About SkillShots
description: How SkillShots works: voted skill battles, single-take video proof, crew-decided pots.

sections.title: About SkillShots
sections.lede: Voted skill battles. Single-take video. Pots split by your crew.

sections.title: How it works
body: A challenge declares a measurable skill (half-court shot, 5-stair kickflip, sub-18 cube solve).
Players upload one continuous take. No edits, no second chances.
Voters compare entries and pick a winner. The pot splits at round close.

sections.title: Rules of the game
body: Every entry is one continuous take. Cuts disqualify.
720p minimum video. Sub-720p rejected at upload.
Spec disputes go to a re-vote. Repeat offenders get rate-limited.

sections.title: Why we built this
body: Skill is performable. Performance should be voted, not algorithmically rewarded.
No engagement loops. No infinite scroll. Just: post a take, get judged, split a pot.
